title: Process Engineer Vacancy at SAIL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at SAIL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, SAIL in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SAIL:
SAIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL!
